title: Learning Opens Doors
subtitle: 高中示范课
summary: 围绕学习习惯、自我成长和长期目标组织句子练习。

sentences.en: Learning English gives us access to new ideas.
sentences.zh: 学习英语让我们接触到新的想法。

sentences.en: A good habit can change your future step by step.
sentences.zh: 一个好习惯可以一步一步改变你的未来。

sentences.en: Every challenge becomes smaller after steady practice.
sentences.zh: 经过稳定练习后，每个挑战都会变得更小。

sentences.en: With patience, you can achieve more than you expect.
sentences.zh: 有了耐心，你能做到比预期更多的事情。
